creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You have some kind of misconfiguration error: 

Cannot open "/lib/libedit.so.7" 

But our recommendation is that for general questions like this, you 
will get better results by asking on the FreeBSD Forums, or, if that 
does not work, on one of the mailing lists.  The Problem Reports 
database isn't really the correct place to ask for help with 
misconfiguration issues, sorry.
